ddls:
CREATE TABLE "playlists" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each playlist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the playlist */,
  "explicit" INTEGER /* Whether the playlist contains explicit content */,
  "followers" INTEGER /* Number of followers for the playlist */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity of the playlist */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the playlist */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the playlist was last updated */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_playlists_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tracks" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each track */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist the track belongs to */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the track */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the track */,
  "duration_ms" INTEGER /* Duration of the track in milliseconds */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the track */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the track */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the track */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the track */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the track */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the track */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the track */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the track */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the track */,
  "artist" TEXT /* Name of the artist */,
  "album" TEXT /* Name of the album */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the track */,
  "track_number" INTEGER /* Track number on the album */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tracks_playlist_id FOREIGN KEY ("playlist_id") REFERENCES playlists ("playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "playlist_genres" (
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("playlist_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, moderator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_playlists" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "playlist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the playlist */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "playlist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "likes" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the like was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dislikes" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the dislike was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id", "user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keys" (
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track */,
  "key_0.0" REAL /* Key 0.0 of the track */,
  "key_1.0" REAL /* Key 1.0 of the track */,
  "key_2.0" REAL /* Key 2.0 of the track */,
  "key_3.0" REAL /* Key 3.0 of the track */,
  "key_4.0" REAL /* Key 4.0 of the track */,
  "key_5.0" REAL /* Key 5.0 of the track */,
  "key_6.0" REAL /* Key 6.0 of the track */,
  "key_7.0" REAL /* Key 7.0 of the track */,
  "key_8.0" REAL /* Key 8.0 of the track */,
  "key_9.0" REAL /* Key 9.0 of the track */,
  "key_10.0" REAL /* Key 10.0 of the track */,
  "key_11.0" REAL /* Key 11.0 of the track */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("track_id")
)
column_names: Whether the playlist contains explicit content
Number of followers for the playlist
Date and time when the playlist was created
Date and time when the playlist was last updated
ID of the user who created the playlist
ID of the playlist the track belongs to
Duration of the track in milliseconds
Date and time when the user account was created
Date and time when the user account was last updated
Role of the user (e.g., user, admin, moderator)
Date and time when the like was created
Date and time when the dislike was created
